Test Case: PHASE 2 — USER ACCEPTANCE TESTING: Daily Schedule + Production Entry
Tester Role: Manufacturing Manager / Planner / Operator

Steps: New DPS: workstation=Flexo Press #1, schedule_date=today
Expected Result: DPS created with name DPS-2026-00001. workstation_type and product_line auto-fetched. Draft status

Steps: Create DPS for Flexo Press #1, check workstation_type field
Expected Result: Auto-populated with Flexo Press. Read-only

Steps: Create DPS for Flexo Press #1, check product_line field
Expected Result: Auto-populated with Label (or whatever Flexo Press #1 is set to). Read-only

Test Case: Duplicate DPS for same machine+date rejected
Steps: Create two DPS documents for Flexo Press #1 on the same date
Expected Result: Second save fails with clear error: A schedule already exists for Flexo Press #1 on [date]

Steps: Create DPS for Flexo Press #1 and Flexo Press #2 on the same date
Expected Result: Both save successfully

Test Case: Add a Schedule Line to DPS
Steps: Open DPS, add row: job_card_type=Job Card Label, job_card_id=select a submitted label job card, production_stage=Printing, planned_qty=5000, sequence_order=10
Expected Result: Row added. Customer auto-fetched from job card. Status defaults to Pending

Steps: Add 3 lines with sequence_order 10, 20, 30
Expected Result: All three rows visible, ordered by sequence_order

Steps: Add a line with planned_qty=8000 to a machine with max_speed_per_hour=4000
Expected Result: estimated_hours auto-calculated to ~2.0 (plus setup time if applicable)

Steps: Change estimated_hours from auto-calculated value to 3.5, save
Expected Result: Manual override persists. Not recalculated on save

Test Case: Change status from Pending to In Progress
Steps: Click status dropdown on a Schedule Line, change to In Progress
Expected Result: Status updates and saves

Test Case: Dynamic Link shows correct job card types
Steps: Click job_card_type dropdown in Schedule Line
Expected Result: Only shows: Job Card Computer Paper, Job Card Label, Job Card Carton

Test Case: Job card ID filters by selected type
Steps: Set job_card_type=Job Card Label, then click job_card_id
Expected Result: Only Label job cards shown in link dropdown
total_planned_qty = 10000

Steps: Add 3 lines with estimated_hours 2.0 + 1.5 + 1.0
Expected Result: total_planned_hours = 4.5

Steps: DPS with total_planned_hours=6.5 and available_hours=8.0
Expected Result: utilization_pct = 81.25%

Steps: Add lines totalling 10 hours on 8-hour machine
Expected Result: utilization_pct = 125%, displayed in red

Steps: Click Submit on a DPS with schedule lines
Expected Result: DPS moves to Submitted. Schedule Lines locked (read-only)

Steps: Click Amend on a submitted DPS
Expected Result: New Draft DPS created with amended_from referencing original. Original stays Submitted

Steps: Click Cancel on a submitted DPS
Expected Result: DPS moves to Cancelled. Lines no longer active

Steps: Navigate to /app/daily-schedule-board
Expected Result: Board displays columns for each active Workstation. Today's date shown

Steps: Click ▶ arrow or pick a date
Expected Result: Board reloads showing DPS data for the selected date. Draft DPS created for machines without one

Test Case: Job cards display correctly on the board
Steps: Check a machine column with schedule lines
Expected Result: Cards show: job card ID, customer, stage, planned qty, estimated hours, status badge

Test Case: Drag a card up/down within a column
Steps: Drag the second card above the first in a machine column
Expected Result: Cards reorder. sequence_order values updated on the underlying Schedule Lines

Test Case: Drag a card to a different machine column
Steps: Drag a Label job from Flexo Press #1 to Flexo Press #2
Expected Result: Card moves. Schedule Line removed from source DPS, added to target DPS

Test Case: Drag a Label job to a Computer Paper-only machine
Steps: Drag a Label job card to Collator #1 (product_line=Computer Paper)
Expected Result: Drop rejected with validation message. Card snaps back to source column

Test Case: Add a job via + Add Job button
Steps: Click + Add Job, search for a submitted job card, select it, choose a machine
Expected Result: New Schedule Line added to the target machine's DPS. Card appears on board

Steps: Click status badge on a card, cycle to In Progress
Expected Result: Status updates on the card and on the underlying Schedule Line

Steps: Check a machine column header with 6h planned on 8h available
Expected Result: Progress bar shows 75%. Text shows 6.0h / 8.0h

Steps: Select product_line=Label from filter dropdown
Expected Result: Only machines with product_line=Label or All are shown

Steps: Select workstation_type=Flexo Press from filter
Expected Result: Only Flexo Press machines shown

Steps: Type 'Acme' in search box
Expected Result: Only cards for Acme Ltd customer visible across all columns

Steps: New PE: job_card_type=Job Card Label, job_card_id=JC-L-00042, production_stage=Printing, workstation=Flexo Press #1, start_time=08:00, end_time=10:00, qty_produced=3000, shift=Day
Expected Result: PE created with name PE-2026-00001. duration_hours auto-calculated to 2.0. waste_pct = 0%

Steps: Create PE for a job card, check customer field
Expected Result: Customer name auto-fetched from job card. Read-only

Steps: Create PE for Flexo Press #1 on a date that has a DPS
Expected Result: daily_production_schedule auto-populated with the matching DPS document

Steps: Create PE: qty_produced=4500, qty_waste=500, waste_reason=Setup Waste
Expected Result: waste_pct auto-calculated to 10%. Saves successfully

Steps: Create PE: qty_waste=200, leave waste_reason blank, try to save
Expected Result: Validation error: Waste Reason is required when qty_waste > 0

Steps: Click Submit on a completed PE
Expected Result: PE moves to Submitted. Fields locked

Test Case: First PE updates job card to In Progress
Steps: Submit PE for a job card that was Not Started, check job card
Expected Result: production_status changed to In Progress. current_stage set to the PE's production_stage

Test Case: Multiple PEs accumulate on job card
Steps: Submit 3 PEs for same job card: 3000 + 2000 + 1500 = 6500 total
Expected Result: Job card shows cumulative progress. If quantity_ordered=5000, production_status = Completed

Steps: Cancel one of the PEs from UT-2.39
Expected Result: Job card total recalculated. production_status may revert to In Progress if total drops below quantity_ordered

Test Case: PE submit updates Schedule Line status
Steps: Submit PE linked to a DPS schedule line that was Pending
Expected Result: Schedule Line status changes to In Progress (or Done if qty met)

Steps: Create PE: start_time=06:00, end_time=14:30
Expected Result: duration_hours = 8.5

Steps: Create PE: start_time=22:00 (night)
Expected Result: shift auto-set to Night (if auto-detection active) or manually selectable

Steps: New DT: workstation=Flexo Press #1, downtime_reason=Mechanical Breakdown, start_time=10:00
Expected Result: DT created as Draft. end_time blank. duration_minutes blank

Steps: Set end_time=10:45 on the draft DT, save
Expected Result: duration_minutes auto-calculated to 45. is_planned=0 (fetched from reason)

Steps: Click Submit on DT with end_time set
Expected Result: DT moves to Submitted

Steps: Try to Submit a DT with blank end_time
Expected Result: Validation error: End Time is required before submitting

Steps: Create DT with reason=Planned Maintenance
Expected Result: is_planned auto-set to checked (fetched from Downtime Reason)

Steps: Create DT for a machine+date that has a DPS
Expected Result: daily_production_schedule auto-populated

Steps: Create DT: start_time=14:00, end_time=13:00
Expected Result: Validation error: End Time must be after Start Time

Test Case: Job card sidebar shows Production Entries
Steps: Open a Job Card Label that has submitted PEs, check sidebar
Expected Result: Connections section shows Production Entry count with link

Test Case: Job card sidebar shows DPS links
Steps: Open a job card that appears in a DPS schedule line
Expected Result: Connections section shows Daily Production Schedule count with link

Test Case: Click connection navigates to filtered list
Steps: Click Production Entry count in job card sidebar
Expected Result: Navigates to Production Entry list filtered to this job card

Steps: Navigate to Daily Production Summary report, set date=today
Expected Result: Report renders with columns: Date, Workstation, Job Card, Customer, Stage, Planned Qty, Actual Qty, Waste Qty, Waste %, Variance, Duration

Steps: Filter by workstation=Flexo Press #1
Expected Result: Only rows for Flexo Press #1 shown

Steps: Check a row where planned_qty=5000 and actual_qty=4500
Expected Result: Variance = -500

Steps: Navigate to Job Progress report
Expected Result: Report renders with columns: Job Card, Type, Customer, Order Qty, Qty Produced, Remaining, Progress %, Waste, Due Date, Days Remaining, Status

Test Case: Job Progress shows correct status colours
Steps: Check a job that is behind schedule
Expected Result: Status shows At Risk (amber) or Overdue (red) as appropriate

Steps: Filter by customer=Acme Ltd
Expected Result: Only Acme Ltd jobs shown

Steps: Click Export on any report
Expected Result: Downloads correctly formatted spreadsheet

Test Case: Manufacturing Manager full access to DPS
Steps: Login as Mfg Manager, create/submit/amend/delete DPS
Expected Result: All operations succeed

Test Case: Manufacturing User can create and submit DPS
Steps: Login as Mfg User, create and submit a DPS
Expected Result: Create and submit work. Delete blocked

Test Case: Production Log User read-only on DPS
Steps: Login as Prod Log User, try to create DPS
Expected Result: Read-only. Create/edit buttons not visible

Test Case: Production Log User can create and submit PE
Steps: Login as Prod Log User, create and submit a Production Entry
Expected Result: Create and submit succeed (operators need this)

Test Case: Production Log User can create and submit DT
Steps: Login as Prod Log User, create and submit a Downtime Entry
Expected Result: Create and submit succeed

Test Case: Schedule Board respects read-only for Prod Log User
Steps: Login as Prod Log User, open Schedule Board
Expected Result: Board loads. Drag disabled. Status badges not clickable
